description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a square plot, surrounded by several mature trees and featuring a flat, modern roofline. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large window openings and a mix of solid and glazed wall sections. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with some areas of wood or similar accent material. The layout includes a central courtyard or open space, visible from above, and the building is integrated into a landscaped environment. There is a detached cylindrical structure nearby, possibly a water tank or utility feature. The overall design is open and contemporary, with an emphasis on blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a central courtyard, surrounded by trees and landscaping. The exterior is light-colored with clean lines and a detached cylindrical utility structure nearby.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance area, central courtyard, and dense tree coverage around the bungalow.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the back facade, more trees, and the detached cylindrical structure positioned to the right.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the elongated layout, central courtyard, and the cylindrical structure in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the main entrance, tree clusters, and the cylindrical structure to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and open courtyard views
